titleStmt.title: SII 22.505: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao

No. 505. (A.R. No. 505 of 1906) CUDDAPAH DISTRICT, PULIVENDLA TALUK, MŌPŪR On the wall at the entrance into the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine of Bhairavēśvara temple. Śaka 1295, Pramādi, Chaitra śu 5 = 1373 A.D., March 29

summary.p: Registers the transaction involving the sale of their shares among the temple priests.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī śakavaruṣaṁbulu
1295 Agunēṁṭi pramādi saṁva
tsarāṣāḍa śu 5 gu yana bhairajīyyala ko
ḍuku pappajīyyala [Aṁdu] rāyapa
jīyala pāpana Ā pappajīyalaku celle
bhairavadēvara pāli Aṁdu Ēmiga
rānu Aṁdulō 19 pāḷaṁ bopa
jīyyalivigo gonaga 50 ṭi cēka
Ī pālu pāpanaku Ācaṁdrā¨rkka
sthāIgā cela śāsanamu

ku sākṣulu Anaṁtapuraṁ kayya nā
gi se puṣpagiriyara bayyama koḍku bha
yi rapajiyyalāna bhaIrajiyya
la koḍku bālajiyya mucu maṟi
gaṁgajiyyalānu śirala Ubhayānmanā
lānu siṁgarāju vrālu

pappajiyyari būmajiyyala jivi 2 [O]pālu
kayyanāgiseṭi Opaṁjinadēvara yiṁdrāOpaṁ yiṁdranātha
bālajiyyala Opaṁ bhayiravadēvara saṁgajīyala Opaṁ
śrīmahādēvara
svadattā dviguṇaṁ puṁṇyaṁ paradattānu pālanaṁ . paradattāpahārēṇa svadattaṁ niṣpha
laṁbhavēt .
Digital edition of SII 22.505 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
